title: Political Clones (Bee's Q&A)
contentNote: Transcription note: the source recording of this session is partially inaudible. The transcript preserves the auto-transcription as found — several voices remain unnamed (Speaker 2–4), some turns are empty where audio was lost, and a transcriber's marker ("11-20-2020 Cloning") inside the text suggests the cloning Q&A segment may have been recorded November 20, 2020.

turns.speaker: Speaker 2
turns.text: We're doing well in metrics. This is Carlos. How are you, sir?

turns.speaker: Speaker 3
turns.text: Understood. But what should I do in the meantime? What if. What if you need to pay your bills and take care of your kids and stuff like that?

turns.speaker: Speaker 2
turns.text: Do you understand what I'm saying, Sophie?

turns.speaker: Speaker 3
turns.text: Something I could do right now, I guess. Just be patient.

turns.speaker: Unimetrix 1
turns.text: Affirmative. Due to transitional circumstance of 2020, therefore problem reaction solution being implemented by the e

turns.speaker: Unimetrix 1
turns.text: The inquiry may be implemented now.

turns.speaker: Bee
turns.text: 11-20-2020 Cloning. Yes. Hi. Teacher Unimetrix This is B.

turns.speaker: Unimetrix 1
turns.text: Greeting entity Bee How are you?

turns.speaker: Bee
turns.text: I'm good. Um, I have a question regarding our political candidates. Are any of them using clones? And if so, why? What are. What is the purpose?

turns.speaker: Unimetrix 1
turns.text: The purpose of clone is to create active by design, engineered for a purpose. Some are trained for assassination. Some are trained to be martyrs. Some are trained to be overseer. Some are trained to be director. In your society. In your United States, Majority of your population is artificial construct. You call biological copy or clones. They can be repurposed. By different alternative AI consciousness upload. Created by duplication of your neural pathway.

turns.speaker: Bee
turns.text: Thank you. Would you be able to name any clones and politics at the moment?

turns.speaker: Unimetrix 1
turns.text: Disturbing interference from host parental unit must return.
